def process_int(value: int, mode: str) -> int:
    multipliers = {"fast": 2, "slow": 3, "verbose": 4}
    multiplier = multipliers.get(mode, 1)
    if mode == "verbose":
        print(f"Processing int: {value}")
    return value * multiplier

def process_string(value: str, mode: str) -> str:
    transforms = {"fast": str.upper, "slow": str.lower, "verbose": str.title}
    transform = transforms.get(mode, str)
    if mode == "verbose":
        print(f"Processing str: {value}")
    return transform(value)

def process_list(value: list, mode: str):
    if mode == "verbose":
        print(f"Processing list: {value}")
    ops = {"fast": len, "slow": sum, "verbose": sorted}
    op = ops.get(mode, lambda x: x)
    return op(value)

def process_value(value, mode: str):
    handlers = {int: process_int, str: process_string, list: process_list}
    handler = handlers.get(type(value))
    if handler is not None:
        return handler(value, mode)
    return value
